'''vathofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabulism|rabulism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabulism|rabulism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vathofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væthefeth|væthefeth]] || [[word:væthefej|væthefej]] || [[word:væthefesh|væthefesh]] || [[word:væthefe|væthefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathothofoth|vathothofoth]] || [[word:vathothofoj|vathothofoj]] || [[word:vathothofosh|vathothofosh]] || [[word:vathothofo|vathothofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathofoth|vathofoth]] || [[word:vathofoj|vathofoj]] || [[word:vathofosh|vathofosh]] || [[word:vathofo|vathofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathoffoth|vathoffoth]] || [[word:vathoffoj|vathoffoj]] || [[word:vathoffosh|vathoffosh]] || [[word:vathoffof|vathoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vathofotho|vathofotho]] || [[word:vathofojo|vathofojo]] || [[word:vathofosho|vathofosho]] || [[word:vathofoko|vathofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vathofoth|vathofoth]] || [[word:vathofoj|vathofoj]] || [[word:vathofosh|vathofosh]] || [[word:vathofo|vathofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vathofothol|vathofothol]] || [[word:vathofojol|vathofojol]] || [[word:vathofoshol|vathofoshol]] || [[word:vathofokol|vathofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vathofothotho|vathofothotho]] || [[word:vathofojojo|vathofojojo]] || [[word:vathofoshosho|vathofoshosho]] || [[word:vathofoko|vathofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vathofothon|vathofothon]] || [[word:vathofojon|vathofojon]] || [[word:vathofoshon|vathofoshon]] || [[word:vathofokon|vathofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vathofothoro|vathofothoro]] || [[word:vathofojoro|vathofojoro]] || [[word:vathofoshoro|vathofoshoro]] || [[word:vathofokoro|vathofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
